brief: Today's news features major outages in Australia affecting emergency calls, the collapse of Graham Platner's Senate campaign, and intensified US strikes on Iran, while research papers explore AI-driven tools for programming education, brain-computer interfaces, and analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.
news_summary: Telstra's network failure disrupted triple-zero calls across Australia; Graham Platner suspended his Senate bid after sexual assault allegations; US launched a second day of strikes on Iran, with Trump declaring the ceasefire 'over'.
papers_summary: Studies on performance-based incentives in visualization, sign language recognition gloves, and AI-mediated privacy redaction were published, alongside new frameworks for analyzing traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Today's news features major outages in Australia affecting emergency calls, the collapse of Graham Platner's Senate campaign, and intensified US strikes on Iran, while research papers explore AI-driven tools for programming education, brain-computer interfaces, and analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.
en.news_summary: Telstra's network failure disrupted triple-zero calls across Australia; Graham Platner suspended his Senate bid after sexual assault allegations; US launched a second day of strikes on Iran, with Trump declaring the ceasefire 'over'.
en.papers_summary: Studies on performance-based incentives in visualization, sign language recognition gloves, and AI-mediated privacy redaction were published, alongside new frameworks for analyzing traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 美伊衝突升級，特朗普叫停停火協議並發動新一輪空襲；中國網紅陳土豆在台灣爆紅引發統戰爭議；北京實施信訪新規減少進京上訪者。
zh.news_summary: 美伊徹夜交火，特朗普稱停火協議「完了」，並對伊朗發動第二天空襲；中國搞笑網紅陳土豆在台灣受歡迎但被質疑統戰；中國新規要求信訪人員赴京前需經省級機關批准，學者指其目的在減少進京上訪者。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv論文探討腦機介面在中國的臨床轉譯、手語識別智慧手套及數位碎片化與生成式AI使用分析，展示跨領域人機互動研究進展。

todays_image.caption: The drifting Lobophora sp. seaweed, adapting to unseen currents, mirrors the uncertain course of UK-China relations should 貝安德 enter Downing Street.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
